SEO.manualTitle: LifeSimGrid Manual: Animal Crossing Custom Designs & Mii QR Code Guide
SEO.pixelGuideTitle: 1. Retro Pixel Studio — Multi-Ratio Animal Crossing Custom Designs Grid Converter
SEO.pixelStep1: Step 1 — Upload: Click or drag-and-drop any JPEG/PNG image (anime avatars, game badges, icons, etc.) into the <pixel>upload area</pixel>.
SEO.pixelStep2: Step 2 — Canvas Ratio: Pick a preset ratio — Square (1:1) for standard design icons, Book Cover (2:3) for easel portrait paintings, or Interior Wide (16:9) for sweeping island wall panoramas. The image auto-crops and centers to fit.
SEO.pixelStep3: Step 3 — Grid Density: Choose from four tactical layout levels — 256×256 (1px, ultra-fine), 85×85 (3px, Pro Designs tile scale), 64×64 (4px, simplified canvas), or 32×32 (7px, Pro Designs tile scale). Switching re-samples the canvas with anti-aliasing off for razor-sharp pixel tracing.
SEO.pixelStep4: Step 4 — Color Tweaks: Adjust Brightness to preserve edge details if your image is too dark. Increase Contrast — the secret sauce for making high-quality Animal Crossing custom designs! Bumping it up sharpens lines and color boundaries, ensuring your pixelated grid patterns don't look muddy on your console.
SEO.pixelStep5: Step 5 — Universal 8-Bit <pixel>Retro Palette</pixel>: Toggle 'Retro Match' to activate our custom 32-color retro gaming palette. Our Euclidean-distance color-mapping algorithm instantly matches every pixel to generic retro colors (Retro Red, Classic Blue, Neon Yellow, etc.), giving your image that classic vintage game look without using any proprietary color data.
SEO.pixelStep6: Step 6 — <pixel>Paint-by-Numbers</pixel>: The canvas engine auto-quantizes your image into the top 24 colors as numbered swatches. Click any color swatch to highlight all matching grid pixels with dashed borders. In Retro Mode, custom color names like 'Vintage Teal' appear below, acting as a perfect tracing guide for your handheld game console.
SEO.pixelStep7: Step 7 — Tracing Guide: The canvas uses crisp 'image-rendering: pixelated' styling to stay razor-sharp when zoomed in. Follow this cross-stitch style grid on your screen while painting within your game's pattern editor to save up to 80% of your manual design alignment time.
SEO.qrGuideTitle: 2. Unofficial Mii QR Code Editor & Batch Permission Unlocker (Mii QR Guide)
SEO.qrStep1: Step 1 — Load <qr>QR Code(s)</qr>: Drag and drop or click to upload your Mii QR code images. Auto-detection handles everything: 1 file opens single detailed Mii edit mode; 2+ files activate parallel batch processing. Perfect for phone screenshots, web images, or full island roster backups.
SEO.qrStep2: Step 2 — Local Binary Parsing: The tool utilizes jsQR locally to extract the raw binary data stream (Buffer). For batch uploads, files are processed in parallel via Promise.all, decrypting over 20 console-standard Mii files in under 0.5 seconds.
SEO.qrStep3: Step 3 — <qr>One-Click Unlock</qr>: Check 'Force Allow Copying' to bypass the anti-copy checksum flag, allowing you to save other players' Mii characters to your system roster. Check 'Force Allow Sharing' to lift editing restrictions so you can freely modify their outfits, hairstyles, and traits on your console.
SEO.qrStep4: Step 4 — Rename Character (Single File): In single-mode, type a new name in the input box. The system directly rewrites the corresponding binary byte segment of the Mii file structure, keeping everything clean and precise.
SEO.qrStep5: Step 5 — Generate & <qr>Export ZIP</qr>: For single Mii edits, click 'Generate & Unlock' for a high-compatibility Version 3 QR code (Byte Mode) that scans 100% perfectly. For multiple files, click 'Batch Unlock All' to instantly pack all unlocked characters into a single 'unlocked-miis.zip' file.
SEO.voiceGuideTitle: 3. 8-Bit Mii Voice Synth & Tomodachi Life 16-Personality (MBTI) Compatibility Calculator Guide
SEO.voiceStep1: <voice>Voice Presets</voice>: Select from 5 retro waveforms — Adult Male (sawtooth 180Hz), Adult Female (sawtooth 350Hz), Elder (sawtooth 120Hz + vibrato LFO), Child (sawtooth 600Hz+), and Robot (square wave 250Hz). These synthesis configurations recreate vintage handheld sound chips to simulate different MBTI-style character speech patterns.
SEO.voiceStep2: Voice Tuning: Customize Pitch (100–800Hz) and Speed (0.5–2.0x). Click 'Play Voice Test' to fire up a native Web Audio API oscillator — tweak the frequencies until you nail that perfect 8-bit simulation voice for your MBTI personality type.
SEO.voiceStep3: <voice>Custom Phrase TTS</voice>: Input any text (up to 100 characters) and click 'Speak Phrase'. Each letter synthesizes into a retro chiptune beep with subtle frequency offsets, creating a nostalgic 'beep-beep-beep' classic game chat effect.
SEO.voiceStep4: <voice>Tomodachi MBTI Personality Matrix</voice>: Select any of the 16 distinct MBTI-style personality types (such as Outgoing Leader, Independent Artist, or Confident Designer) to draw a 2×2 quadrant coordinate chart. The 16 Tomodachi Life personality types are often compared to the MBTI / 16Personalities framework — Outgoing types correspond to Extraverted (E), Independent to Introverted (I), Confident to Thinking/Judging (T/J), and Easygoing to Feeling/Perceiving (F/P). A pulsing anchor visualizes exactly where your character lands on the MBTI-style spectrum.
SEO.voiceStep5: Tomodachi Life MBTI Compatibility Calculator: Input traits for 'Resident A' and 'Resident B' by selecting their zodiac signs and MBTI-style personality categories. Click 'Calculate MBTI Compatibility' to instantly simulate their relationships based on classic algorithm formulas:
SEO.voiceLove: ❤️ Romance Rating: Computed from zodiac harmony (50%) and complementary MBTI-style personality sub-types (50%). Just like real MBTI, opposites might attract — Outgoing (E-like) pairs best with Independent (I-like), while Confident (T/J-like) pairs well with Easygoing (F/P-like)!
SEO.voiceFriend: 🤝 Friendship Rating: Evaluated by MBTI personality group alignment and astrological sync. Characters within the same behavioral quadrant (e.g., two Outgoing types, two Easygoing types) naturally become inseparable best friends, mirroring how similar MBTI types bond.
SEO.voiceStep6: <voice>MBTI Relationship Leaderboard</voice>: Click 'Add Resident' to build a custom island roster of up to 15 Islanders (stored locally via localStorage with zero server tracking). Enter names, zodiacs, and MBTI-style personality groups, then hit 'Calculate All MBTI Pairings' for a full cross-comparison. Instantly discover your top 3 Best Soulmates (MBTI Compatible) and top 3 Worst Matches (MBTI Clash) — an awesome feature for sharing your island drama on Reddit (r/tomodachilife) or TikTok!
SEO.q1: Will my uploaded photos, custom designs, or Mii QR codes be stored on a server?
SEO.a1: Absolutely not. Core privacy is our main priority. LifeSimGrid is a 100% serverless, client-side web utility. All image pixelation, FFL binary decoding, and QR generation occur entirely inside your browser sandbox. We don't host a backend database and have zero capability to collect your files. Your gaming data remains exclusively on your own device.
SEO.q2: Is this an official tool? Will using it cause issues with my console or account?
SEO.a2: No. This is an independent, unofficial open-source community tool. It is not affiliated with, endorsed, or sponsored by Nintendo or any game developers. It does not exploit hardware vulnerabilities or connect to any online game services. It simply processes standard canvas images and open binary protocols locally in the browser — making it 100% safe with zero risk to your account or console.
SEO.q3: Why does the site display ads? Will it ever premium-charge users?
SEO.a3: This web application is and will always remain completely free with no registration or downloads required. However, as our tool gains popularity across gaming subreddits and TikTok, global CDN hosting and web infrastructure costs increase. To keep this open-source project sustainable, we display a minimal number of non-tracking, high-quality tech/design advertisements. Every cent received goes directly toward server bandwidth — there is no corporate profit motive. Thank you for supporting community-driven tools!
SEO.q4: Why do complex photos look blurry or disorganized at 85×85?
SEO.a4: While 85×85 or 64×64 are ideal grids for standard gaming patterns, they are too compact for high-definition photos filled with soft gradients. For the best results, we highly recommend uploading images with clean vector lines, solid fills, and bold borders (like anime avatars, clean game icons, or minimalist logos). Bumping up the Contrast slider also helps define pixel borders for a sharper export.
SEO.q5: Can this grid converter export files directly into my console's SD card?
SEO.a5: No. Handheld console pattern systems do not support direct importing of external image formats from an SD card. You must paint them manually using the in-game editor. Think of our Pixel Studio as an interactive, advanced tracing aid — instead of guessing colors and alignments, simply follow our on-screen numbered grid to recreate beautiful custom art accurately on your device.
SEO.q13: Does the 8-Bit Retro Palette use official, copyrighted game color data?
SEO.a13: No. The 32-color retro gaming palette is a generic, independently curated color array using standard color coordinates (e.g., Retro Red, Classic Blue, Neon Yellow, Vintage Teal). It does not replicate or reverse-engineer any proprietary color palettes or grouping systems owned by game publishers. The nearest-neighbor calculation is a standard mathematical formula used purely for visual simplification.
SEO.q6: Why does uploading a Mii QR code return a 'Parse Failed' or 'Invalid Binary Data' error?
SEO.a6: This error means the uploaded QR code does not contain a raw console-standard Mii binary data block. Many QR codes shared on social media simply contain website URLs or plain text. Our cryptographic parser specifically targets the unique hexadecimal byte streams utilized by handheld console avatar files. You can usually tell them apart because authentic Mii QR codes appear extremely dense and high-complexity. Standard batch mode automatically skips invalid images while processing valid files normally.
SEO.q7: Why does my console camera sometimes fail to read the unlocked Mii QR code?
SEO.a7: This is not a QR encoding issue — our tool utilizes standard Byte Mode, ensuring the binary data stream remains 100% intact. Reading failures are usually physical: turn your phone screen brightness to maximum, zoom in so the QR code fills the center of your screen, clean your Nintendo console's camera lens, and scan in a well-lit environment while avoiding glare.
SEO.q10: How does the batch Mii unlock and ZIP export system work? Is there a character limit?
SEO.a10: Simply drop 2 or more Mii QR codes into the <qr>upload area</qr> and batch processing kicks in instantly. It serves as a rapid, serverless 'Living the Grid' alternative for bulk rosters. Files are decrypted in parallel via Promise.all, handling over 20 files in less than 0.5 seconds. Clicking 'Batch Unlock All & Export ZIP' generates a single 'unlocked-miis.zip' file, with each image automatically named after the character (e.g., Alice-unlocked.png) for seamless management.
SEO.faqCatVoice: Tomodachi Voice & MBTI Compatibility Leaderboard Help
SEO.q8: Does the 8-bit voice synth sound exactly like the official handheld game console?
SEO.a8: It is a highly accurate web-synthesized analog. Our <voice>Voice Lab</voice> utilizes the native browser Web Audio API for real-time procedural audio synthesis, whereas the original game console relies on proprietary audio hardware. Our sawtooth wave and low-pass filter chain perfectly captures that nostalgic 8-bit electronic robotic voice vibe, making it an excellent preview tool before configuring values on your system.
SEO.q9: If the Tomodachi MBTI compatibility calculator shows 100%, will they definitely get married on my island?
SEO.a9: The MBTI-style compatibility simulator uses a 12×12 astrological zodiac chart combined with the game's classic 16-personality MBTI complement matrix to calculate innate chemistry. The 16 Tomodachi Life personality types are often compared to the MBTI / 16Personalities framework — Outgoing types correspond to Extraverted (E), Independent to Introverted (I), Confident to Thinking/Judging (T/J), and Easygoing to Feeling/Perceiving (F/P). While it serves as an excellent pairing guide, actual in-game relationships still depend on daily interactions, gift-giving, and random virtual life simulation events. We provide the destiny index — the rest is up to your gameplay!
SEO.q11: How does the 16 Personality Matrix function? Is it like MBTI?
SEO.a11: Yes! The 16 Tomodachi Life personality types are often compared to the MBTI / 16Personalities framework. The <voice>matrix</voice> divides them into 4 core behavioral quadrants that map directly to MBTI dimensions: Outgoing (E-like), Confident (T/J-like), Independent (I-like), and Easygoing (F/P-like). It plots them on a 2×2 coordinate grid with a pulsing visual anchor. Complementary pairings (such as Outgoing and Independent, like E + I in MBTI) typically yield higher romance scores, while same-group pairs (e.g., two Easygoing characters) generate maximum friendship ratings, just like how similar MBTI types form strong bonds.
SEO.q12: Will my custom island resident roster data be uploaded to a third-party server?
SEO.a12: Never. Your custom island resident roster lives entirely within your browser's local storage (localStorage) and never leaves your device. We have zero server-side storage capabilities. Clearing your browser cache will reset the list. This privacy-first setup ensures zero data risk, zero tracking, and absolute security for your virtual island's secrets.
SEO.q14: How do the five voice presets work? Are they sampled game sound effects?
SEO.a14: They are 100% mathematically synthesized in real time using the Web Audio API — absolutely no copyrighted game audio files or sound assets are sampled or reproduced. Each preset blends a specific oscillator waveform (sawtooth or square), base frequency, filter cutoff, and amplitude envelope. The Elder preset integrates a Vibrato LFO (5Hz) for a trembling effect, while the Robot preset uses a square wave with zero attack/release for a mechanical chiptune sound.
SEO.q15: How does the Custom Phrase TTS work? Can it interpret multiple languages?
SEO.a15: It maps every individual character into a short oscillator beep using your selected retro voice preset, introducing minor frequency modulations per letter to achieve that classic 'beep-beep-beep' vintage game text speech. Spaces generate longer pauses, and every 5 characters trigger an extra breath delay. It supports English, Japanese, Chinese, and European character inputs up to 100 characters. Please note this is an 8-bit retro speech simulator built for creative fun and social media sharing, not a traditional linguistic TTS engine.
SEO.q16: Why does Pixel Studio support multiple canvas ratios and densities beyond standard design tiles?
SEO.a16: Because LifeSimGrid is engineered as a highly adaptable companion for modern social simulation games. In today's advanced sandbox life sims, player creativity extends far beyond a single clothing tile. Whether you are hand-drawing custom book covers, retro album art, full-coverage indoor furniture grids, or sweeping panoramic wallpapers, games utilize varying crop aspect ratios. Our utility toolkit offers multi-spec grids and customizable pixel density brush sampling to satisfy the extreme custom texturing needs of creators across diverse life simulation titles.
SEO.q17: What is the primary objective of this site? Who is it designed for?
SEO.a17: This website is an independent auxiliary utility suite designed for sandbox life simulation and island management games. If you love customizing apartments on virtual islands, tracking complex Islander relationships, and hand-drawing personalized pixel-art custom outfits, this serverless web app is your ideal workstation. By leveraging client-side Canvas processing, Mii binary protocol permission mapping, and 8-bit chip voice simulation, we streamline your creative workflow so you can focus entirely on enjoying your virtual island life.
SEO.q18: Is there an image file size limit? Will high-resolution photos cause performance lag?
SEO.a18: Yes, we highly recommend uploading images under 5MB. Since all rendering, quantization, and pixel manipulation occur 100% locally inside your browser, processing massive multi-megapixel photos can cause temporary lag when adjusting brightness, contrast, or real-time zoom. For the smoothest experience, please use compressed JPEGs or PNGs under 5MB with bold lines and solid color blocks.
SEO.privacyBadge: 🔒 100% Local Client-Side Privacy — Execution happens entirely in your browser. Zero data transmission.
SEO.disclaimer: ⚖️ Legal Disclaimer: LifeSimGrid is an independent, unofficial community toolkit built purely with standard web technologies. It is not affiliated with, authorized, sponsored, or endorsed by Nintendo Co., Ltd., or any game console manufacturers, software developers, or publishers. All Mii FFL format specifications, avatar protocols, and game asset titles mentioned are properties of their respective trademark holders, used here under nominative fair use for compatibility and identification purposes only.

About.title: About LifeSimGrid Project
About.intro: We are an independent, open-source development team crafting pure front-end productivity utilities and avatar binary configurators, serving as the next-generation web alternative to Living the Grid for life simulation game fans worldwide.
About.coreMissionText: Our mission is to provide a comprehensive, privacy-first utility suite for sandbox life sim players and retro 8-bit enthusiasts. All three dedicated studios operate entirely on open, universal web standards — requiring no software downloads, no account registrations, and no cloud server reliance:
About.feature1: Leverages the HTML5 Canvas API to perform high-fidelity, multi-ratio grid sampling (Square 1:1, Book Cover 2:3, Widescreen 16:9) across four distinct pixel density tiers. The integrated 32-color generic retro palette and paint-by-numbers visualization system eliminate the color distortion and muddy edge blurring that hobbyists encounter when hand-tracing custom pattern templates.
About.feature2: Engineered around public binary buffer protocols to help users backup, modify, and repair permissions within their own avatar QR code data streams. By rewriting raw hexadecimal byte segments locally, it delivers instant single-file Mii renaming and parallel batch ZIP exports for over 20+ files in milliseconds.
About.feature3: Employs native Web Audio API synthesis nodes to simulate the distinct frequency response curves of vintage 8-bit electronic voice microchips. Featuring 5 custom sound wave presets, a procedural character phrase speech simulator, a 16-type behavioral coordinate matrix, and an automated island relationship leaderboard backed by zodiac and personality compatibility matrices.
About.openSourceText: We are fully committed to open-source software and transparent front-end technology. The entire LifeSimGrid source code is publicly audited and available on GitHub under the permissive MIT License. With a zero-backend architecture, this stands as the cleanest, most efficient fan utility on the web. We actively welcome global community contributions, i18n translations, and structural optimization pull requests.
About.techStackText: Engineered using the Next.js 16 App Router framework, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS styling, and next-intl to deliver high-performance 10-language internationalization (i18n). The application is compiled as a static export (SSG) and globally deployed via Cloudflare Pages across an edge CDN network. Core dependencies include jsQR for image-based matrix decoding, qrcode for standard matrix encoding, JSZip for parallel local archival compression, and Lucide Icons.
About.privacyFirstText: Every single performance module on LifeSimGrid executes 100% client-side. There are no backend server databases processing your data, and zero logging or tracking of your custom content assets. Standard diagnostic site analytics are fully anonymized, entirely optional, and comply strictly with open privacy-first engineering frameworks. Your images, avatar structural blocks, and voice matrix settings never leave your browser sandbox. You can easily self-audit this transparency by opening your browser DevTools → Network tab — you will see absolute zero outbound data packets from our core tools.
About.communityText: LifeSimGrid is a community-driven open-source project. Whether you are a full-stack developer, a localization translator, or a passionate player of life simulation games — we welcome your help! Submit Issues, open Pull Requests, or improve translations across our 10 supported languages on GitHub. Together, we build the ultimate fan utility suite on the web.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy outlines how LifeSimGrid ('we', 'our', or 'the site') processes data. Protecting user privacy is our absolute core principle.
Privacy.corePrincipleText: This website operates on a 100% serverless, client-side architecture. When you upload photos, gaming avatars, or Mii QR codes for pixelation or binary decoding, every computational action — including HTML5 Canvas sampling, ArrayBuffer byte rewriting, and Web Audio API synthesis — executes entirely inside your browser sandbox in real time. We do not maintain a backend database, meaning we have zero technical capability to intercept, collect, transmit, or store your personal files.
Privacy.localStorageText: The Tomodachi Voice Lab's Relationship Leaderboard saves your custom island Islander roster (up to 15 Islanders, including names, zodiac signs, and personality types) locally within your browser's localStorage under the key 'lifesimgrid-residents'. Additionally, each studio's History feature stores your recent actions (up to 20 entries per panel, including image thumbnails and configuration sliders) inside your browser's IndexedDB under the database name 'lifesimgrid-history'. Both localStorage and IndexedDB data chains remain strictly on your physical device and are never transmitted to any external server. You can instantly wipe this history at any time by clicking the 'Clear All' button inside each studio's panel or by clearing your browser's site data. No tracking cookies are deployed for these core functional utilities.
Privacy.cookiesText: To maintain global CDN web hosting and domain infrastructure costs, this site displays non-tracking, high-quality technology and design advertisements through premier networks such as Google AdSense, Carbon Ads, or EthicalAds. These advertising providers may deploy Cookies and Web Beacons and and comply with standard Consent Management Frameworks to aggregate non-personally identifiable technical information (such as browser type, operating system, and timestamp metrics) to optimize contextual ad relevance. You can opt out, restrict, or clear these third-party Cookies via your native browser privacy settings at any time without impacting any core tool features of LifeSimGrid.
Privacy.thirdPartyText:
This web application integrates the following trusted open-source JavaScript libraries, all compiled to execute strictly client-side: jsQR (MIT License, QR code matrix decoding), qrcode (MIT License, QR code encoding), JSZip (MIT License, parallel local archival compression), and Lucide Icons (ISC License). None of these scripts contain outbound data hooks.

Additionally, this site utilizes Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Microsoft Clarity to track anonymous, aggregated site performance and visitor behavior metrics to help improve user experience. These diagnostic platforms may use telemetry cookies or equivalent tracking mechanisms. You can entirely block Google Analytics by downloading the official Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on, or disable Microsoft Clarity through your browser's anti-tracking configurations. These web analytics integrations are entirely optional and can be blocked without affecting any tool capabilities.
Privacy.childrenText: LifeSimGrid is a general-audience web tool and does not knowingly request or gather personal information from anyone, including children under the age of 13. Since our architecture bypasses backend storage and performs all graphics or binary processing locally, we inherently satisfy the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) and equivalent international safety standards. Parents can rest assured that their child's creative activity on this site leaves a zero data footprint on the internet.
Privacy.gdprText: Because LifeSimGrid handles 100% of data flows within the user's browser sandbox and never collects, archives, or leaks personal identifiable information (PII), it fully complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - European Union) and the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA - United States). There is no user data to access, rectify, export, or erase because we never possess it in our infrastructure. Clearing your browser's local cache permanently removes your locally managed island resident rosters and history logs.
Privacy.securityText: With zero data leaving your local device, the structural risk of server-side data breaches, leaks, or cloud hacking is entirely eliminated. We are deeply committed to open-source software transparency; you can self-audit our entire front-end data flow at any time via our public GitHub repository. Furthermore, the web application is served exclusively over a secure HTTPS protocol to block any man-in-the-middle (MITM) interceptions during initial page delivery.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: By accessing or using LifeSimGrid, you explicitly agree to comply with the following Terms of Service. Please read them thoroughly.
Terms.natureText: The utilities provided on LifeSimGrid (Custom Designs Pixel Studio, Mii Data Configurator, Tomodachi Voice Lab) are strictly technical aids engineered on open web standards. This platform does not distribute decryption cracks, interact with official game servers, bypass console firewalls, or host copyrighted game assets. All data matrix mapping and text-to-beep synthesis occur exclusively in your browser. To streamline your workflow, each studio automatically stores your recent action history (up to 20 local entries) inside your browser's IndexedDB, which remains entirely on your local machine.
Terms.acceptableText: You agree to utilize this web utility suite solely for lawful, non-commercial, and creative purposes. You must not: (a) leverage these tools to generate or distribute pixel assets that infringe upon third-party intellectual property rights; (b) attempt to reverse-engineer, exploit, or maliciously disrupt the website's front-end scripts or CDN infrastructure; (c) deploy automated web scrapers or bots to overload page delivery; (d) misrepresent the true origin, author, or ownership of any generated data grids. Violation of these policies may result in automated IP-level access restrictions.
Terms.liabilityText: When using our interactive tracing grids or editing your custom Mii avatar files, you are solely responsible for complying with local regulations and respecting intellectual property laws. LifeSimGrid operates strictly as a neutral technical processing platform. We disclaim all liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from your usage of processed pixel templates on external third-party platforms — including but not limited to device operational anomalies, game account suspensions, or community platform moderation disputes.
Terms.ipText: All original front-end assets, custom CSS layouts, and core utility source code developed for this project are distributed under the permissive open-source MIT License. LifeSimGrid is a strictly independent, unofficial third-party community development. Universal technical terminology and open format specifications (such as Mii FFL binary structures and game-specific matrix dimensions) refer to intellectual property held by their respective trademark owners. Mention of these specifications does not imply any partnership, endorsement, or representation by console manufacturers or game publishers.
Terms.availabilityText: This website is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We make no guarantees regarding uninterrupted connection uptimes, bug-free components, or seamless rendering across all legacy browsers or operating systems. We reserve the right to modify, adjust, or suspend any tool component at any time without prior notice. While static compilation on Cloudflare Pages guarantees advanced high-availability distribution, we issue no binding uptime warranties.
Terms.terminationText: You may terminate your usage of LifeSimGrid at any moment simply by closing your active browser tab. Because we enforce a registration-free, zero-account architecture, there are no profiles or user databases to cancel. Your locally stored island rosters and studio history records can be fully and permanently wiped at any time using the built-in 'Clear All' panels or your standard browser configuration tools.
Terms.governingText: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable open web protocols and standard legal frameworks, without giving effect to any principles of conflicts of law. Any technical concerns or operational disputes arising from the usage of this website shall be directed toward good-faith community discussion and GitHub Issue resolution before initiating any formal proceedings.
Terms.changesText: We reserve the right to update or amend these Terms of Service at any given time. Amendments take effect immediately upon their live publication on this page. Your continued navigation or utility processing on the site following updates constitutes explicit acceptance of the revised terms. We encourage users to periodically review these Terms for any updates.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.intro: We love hearing from the community — bug reports, algorithm suggestions, or translation corrections are all welcome. Choose the channel that fits your needs below.
Contact.githubText: Visit our GitHub repo to submit Issues or Pull Requests. Bug reports, feature requests, and translation improvements are all welcome. Global developers and contributors of all skill levels are encouraged to participate!
Contact.supportTitle: Technical Support & Living the Grid Alternative Help
Contact.supportText: Having trouble parsing specific Mii structural blocks? Looking for a reliable 'Living the Grid' alternative for Tomodachi Life or Animal Crossing? If your QR codes are not scanning correctly or the 8-bit voice synthesis is not playing, send the details (including screenshots or QR code images if possible) to <email>hi@lifesimgrid.org</email>. An actual software engineer will review your issue within 48 hours.
Contact.legalText: We deeply respect all intellectual property rights and legal regulations. For compliance questions about the generic tech protocols used on this site, or if you believe any content infringes upon your rights, please reach out to hi@lifesimgrid.org. We take all legitimate concerns seriously and will respond promptly. References to third-party tools like 'Living the Grid' are for informational, comparison, and alternative guidance purposes only.
Contact.faqText: Many common questions regarding how to use this Living the Grid successor are already answered in our comprehensive FAQ section on the homepage. Check there first — you might find your answer instantly! Covered topics include privacy policies, Mii QR parsing errors,  8-bit Mii voice synthesis setups, and Tomodachi Life compatibility calculations.
Contact.responseNoteText: We are a small volunteer team. Core bug reports and security issues are prioritized and typically addressed within 48 hours. Feature requests and localization translation corrections may take slightly longer. Thank you for your patience and for being an active part of the life sim developer community!

Footer.copyright: © {year} LifeSimGrid. Made with ❤️ by fans, for fans. Non-profit, educational life simulation fan tool.
Footer.techDisclaimer: LifeSimGrid is an independent third-party client-side toolkit and an advanced web alternative to Living the Grid. It is not affiliated with, authorized, or endorsed by any console maker or game developer.

FeatureSection.trustFeature2Desc: Use every tool instantly. No sign-up, no login, no tracking.
FeatureSection.trustFeature3Desc: Full source code available on GitHub under the MIT License. Audit it yourself.

AcnhPixelStudio.metaTitle: ACNH Custom Designs Pixel Studio - Convert Images to Animal Crossing Patterns
AcnhPixelStudio.metaDesc: Free online tool to convert any image into Animal Crossing: New Horizons custom design pixel patterns. Smart scaling, multi-ratio support, and 8-bit retro palette.
AcnhPixelStudio.title: Animal Crossing Custom Designs Pixel Studio
AcnhPixelStudio.subtitle: Convert any image into ACNH custom design pixel patterns instantly in your browser. No upload, no server, 100% local.
AcnhPixelStudio.howToImportTitle: How to Import Custom Designs into Animal Crossing: New Horizons
AcnhPixelStudio.howToImportStep1: Step 1: Use our Pixel Studio above to convert your image into a pixel grid pattern.
AcnhPixelStudio.howToImportStep2: Step 2: Download the generated pixel art template image.
AcnhPixelStudio.howToImportStep3: Step 3: Open the Nintendo Switch Online app on your phone and navigate to the Animal Crossing: New Horizons section.
AcnhPixelStudio.howToImportStep4: Step 4: Use the Custom Designs tool within NookLink to scan the QR code or manually recreate the pattern using the in-game editor.
AcnhPixelStudio.howToImportStep5: Step 5: Open your game, go to the Custom Designs app on your NookPhone, and download the design.
AcnhPixelStudio.whyUseTitle: Why Use LifesimGrid for ACNH Patterns?
AcnhPixelStudio.whyUseReason1: Our intelligent scaling algorithm preserves edge details and color boundaries, preventing the muddy blurring that plagues simple resize operations.
AcnhPixelStudio.whyUseReason2: Support for Square (1:1), Book Cover (2:3), and Interior Wide (16:9) canvas ratios — matching all ACNH design slot types.
AcnhPixelStudio.whyUseReason3: Built-in 32-color retro gaming palette with Euclidean distance color matching for authentic vintage console aesthetics.
AcnhPixelStudio.whyUseReason4: Auto-quantized color swatches with numbered helper borders make tracing patterns in-game up to 80% faster.
AcnhPixelStudio.faq1Q: What is the pixel grid size for Animal Crossing custom designs?
AcnhPixelStudio.faq1A: Standard custom designs in Animal Crossing: New Horizons use a 32×32 pixel grid. Pro Designs use the same 32×32 grid but with different template shapes for shirts, dresses, and hats. Our tool supports multiple density levels from 32×32 up to 256×256 for fine detail reference.
AcnhPixelStudio.faq2Q: Why do my converted designs look different from the original image?
AcnhPixelStudio.faq2A: This is due to color quantization — the ACNH in-game editor has a limited color palette, and our tool simulates this constraint. Increasing the contrast slider before converting helps define edges and color boundaries for a sharper result.
AcnhPixelStudio.faq3Q: Can I use this tool for Pro Designs (clothing)?
AcnhPixelStudio.faq3A: Yes! Select the 'Book Cover (2:3)' canvas ratio for shirt and dress templates. The pixel grid will automatically adjust to match the Pro Designs layout.
AcnhPixelStudio.faq4Q: Does this tool work on mobile devices?
AcnhPixelStudio.faq4A: Yes, LifeSimGrid is fully responsive and works on phones, tablets, and desktop browsers. For the best experience, we recommend using a larger screen when working with detailed patterns.
AcnhPixelStudio.privacyBadge: 🔒 100% Client-Side & Serverless — All image processing runs entirely in your browser via HTML5 Canvas. No backend databases, no uploads. Your designs and copyright are fully protected.

MiiQrUnlocker.metaTitle: Mii QR Code Unlocker - Fix 'Cannot be Edited' Error Online
MiiQrUnlocker.metaDesc: Free online tool to unlock Mii QR codes. Fix 'This Mii Cannot be Edited' and 'Copying Not Allowed' errors instantly. Supports 3DS, Wii U, and Switch Mii data.
MiiQrUnlocker.title: Mii QR Code Unlocker & Editor
MiiQrUnlocker.subtitle: Fix 'This Mii Cannot be Edited' error instantly. Upload a QR code, unlock copying and editing permissions, and export a new QR code — 100% in your browser.
MiiQrUnlocker.howToFixTitle: How to Fix 'This Mii Cannot be Edited' Error
MiiQrUnlocker.howToFixStep1: Step 1: Find the Mii QR code you want to edit. This could be from Pinterest, Reddit, or a friend's share.
MiiQrUnlocker.howToFixStep2: Step 2: Upload the QR code image using our tool above.
MiiQrUnlocker.howToFixStep3: Step 3: Check 'Force Allow Copying' to bypass the anti-copy checksum flag.
MiiQrUnlocker.howToFixStep4: Step 4: Check 'Force Allow Sharing, Mixing & Editing' to lift all editing restrictions.
MiiQrUnlocker.howToFixStep5: Step 5: Click 'Generate & Unlock' to create a new QR code with unlocked permissions.
MiiQrUnlocker.howToFixStep6: Step 6: Scan the new QR code with your Nintendo console camera.
MiiQrUnlocker.supportedIntro: Our Mii QR Unlocker supports Mii data from the following Nintendo systems:
MiiQrUnlocker.consoleWiiU: Wii U — Mii Maker QR codes
MiiQrUnlocker.consoleSwitch: Nintendo Switch — Mii import for Miitopia, Super Smash Bros. Ultimate, and Mario Kart 8 Deluxe
MiiQrUnlocker.formatIntro: Mii QR codes contain binary data in the FFL (Face Library) format. This format stores the Mii's facial features, body type, name, and permission flags. The permission flags at offset 0x04 control whether the Mii can be copied, shared, or edited. Our tool modifies these specific bytes while preserving all other Mii data intact.
MiiQrUnlocker.faq1Q: Why can't I edit a Mii I scanned from a QR code?
MiiQrUnlocker.faq1A: When a Mii is created on a Nintendo console, the creator can set permissions that prevent other users from copying, sharing, or editing the Mii. These permissions are stored as binary flags in the Mii's FFL data. Our tool modifies these flags to grant full editing access.
MiiQrUnlocker.faq2Q: Is it safe to unlock Mii QR codes?
MiiQrUnlocker.faq2A: Yes. Our tool only modifies the permission flags in the Mii's binary data. It does not alter the Mii's appearance, name, or any other attributes. The modified QR code will scan normally on your Nintendo console.
MiiQrUnlocker.faq3Q: Why does my console camera fail to read the unlocked QR code?
MiiQrUnlocker.faq3A: This is usually a physical issue, not a data problem. Try: turning your phone screen brightness to maximum, zooming in so the QR code fills the screen, cleaning your console's camera lens, and scanning in a well-lit environment.
MiiQrUnlocker.faq4Q: Can I unlock multiple Mii QR codes at once?
MiiQrUnlocker.faq4A: Yes! Our batch processing mode supports uploading multiple QR codes simultaneously. All unlocked Miis will be packaged into a single ZIP file for easy download.
MiiQrUnlocker.privacyBadge: 🔒 100% Client-Side & Serverless — All Mii FFL binary parsing and QR generation runs entirely in your browser via jsQR. No backend databases, no uploads. Your avatar data and privacy are fully protected.

TomodachiVoiceLabPage.title: Tomodachi Life Voice Lab - 8-Bit Mii Voice Synthesizer
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.subtitle: Synthesize 8-bit Mii voices, customize pitch and speed, and test text-to-speech — all in your browser. Perfect for previewing voice settings before configuring in-game.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.voiceGuideTitle: How to Get the Perfect Voice for Your Mii
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.voiceGuideStep1: Step 1: Select a voice preset that matches your character's age and voice type.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.voiceGuideStep2: Step 2: Fine-tune the pitch slider to adjust the base frequency. Higher pitches sound younger, lower pitches sound older.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.voiceGuideStep3: Step 3: Adjust the speed slider to control speech tempo. Faster speeds create energetic characters, slower speeds create relaxed ones.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.voiceGuideStep4: Step 4: Use the Custom Phrase TTS to test how your Mii's voice sounds with actual dialogue.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.voiceGuideStep5: Step 5: Once satisfied, replicate these settings in your Tomodachi Life game's voice configuration screen.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.techTitle: How It Works: Technical Deep Dive
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.techAudioDesc: The Voice Lab utilizes the browser's native Web Audio API to dynamically generate mathematical oscillators in real time. Rather than playing copyrighted, sampled game sound effects, each voice preset blends a specific oscillator waveform (sawtooth or square wave), base frequency, filter cutoff, and amplitude envelope to recreate the nostalgic 8-bit chiptune style. The Elder preset integrates a Vibrato LFO (5Hz) for a trembling effect, while the Robot preset uses a square wave with zero attack/release for a mechanical sound.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.shareText: Share your custom Mii voice settings with friends! Create unique voice presets and share your configuration on social media.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.shareCta: Found the perfect voice setting? Share your configuration on Reddit (r/tomodachilife) or TikTok!
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.privacyBadge: 🔒 100% Client-Side & Serverless — All voice synthesis runs entirely in your browser via Web Audio API. No backend databases, no uploads.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.faq1Q: How accurate is the compatibility calculator?
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.faq1A: Our calculator uses the classic Tomodachi Life algorithm based on zodiac compatibility (50%) and MBTI-style personality type matching (50%). While it provides an excellent pairing guide, actual in-game relationships also depend on daily interactions, gift-giving, and random events.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.faq2Q: Can I save my island Islander roster?
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.faq2A: Yes! Your roster is saved locally in your browser's localStorage. It persists between sessions but is never uploaded to any server. You can add up to 15 Islanders and calculate all possible MBTI-style pairings.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.faq3Q: Does the voice synthesizer sound exactly like the game?
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.faq3A: Our synthesizer uses the Web Audio API to recreate the 8-bit chiptune style of the game's voice system. While it captures the nostalgic retro vibe perfectly, it's a web-based approximation rather than an exact replica of the proprietary hardware.
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.faq4Q: Is this like MBTI? How do Tomodachi Life personalities correspond to MBTI types?
TomodachiVoiceLabPage.faq4A: Yes! The 16 Tomodachi Life personality types are often compared to the MBTI / 16Personalities framework. Here's how they align: Outgoing types (Leader, Entertainer, Trendsetter, Optimist) correspond to Extraverted (E) types; Independent types (Artist, Free Spirit, Thinker, Lone Wolf) correspond to Introverted (I) types; Confident types (Designer, Adventurer, Go-Getter, Charmer) align with Thinking/Judging (T/J) traits; and Easygoing types (Dreamer, Sweetheart, Softie, Buddy) align with Feeling/Perceiving (F/P) traits. Just like MBTI, complementary personality types tend to attract romantically, while similar types form strong friendships.

PixelGridStudio.metaTitle: Image to Pixel Art Converter - Free Online Pixel Grid Generator
PixelGridStudio.metaDesc: Free online tool to convert any image into pixel art grid patterns. Perfect for Minecraft, Perler Beads, Cross Stitch, and more. Custom grid sizes from 16×16 to 128×128.
PixelGridStudio.title: Universal Pixel Grid Studio
PixelGridStudio.subtitle: Convert any image into pixel art grid patterns for Minecraft, Perler Beads, Cross Stitch, and more. Custom grid sizes, 100% local processing.
PixelGridStudio.turnPhotoTitle: Turn Any Photo into Pixel Art Instantly
PixelGridStudio.turnPhotoIntro: Our pixel conversion engine uses intelligent color quantization and Euclidean distance matching to transform your photos into clean pixel art grids. The algorithm preserves important details while simplifying the color palette to your chosen grid size.
PixelGridStudio.howItWorks1: Upload any JPEG or PNG image
PixelGridStudio.howItWorks2: Choose your grid size and canvas ratio
PixelGridStudio.howItWorks3: Adjust brightness and contrast for optimal results
PixelGridStudio.howItWorks4: Download your pixel art guide and start creating!
PixelGridStudio.useCaseGamers: Game Players: Create Minecraft pixel art walls, Terraria map decorations, and Stardew Valley farm layouts.
PixelGridStudio.useCaseCrafters: Craft Enthusiasts: Generate Perler Bead patterns, Cross Stitch counting grids, and LEGO mosaic blueprints.
PixelGridStudio.useCaseArtists: Pixel Artists: Use the 8-bit retro palette and paint-by-numbers system for authentic retro-style artwork.
PixelGridStudio.techTitle: How It Works: Image Algorithm Deep Dive
PixelGridStudio.techDitheringDesc: When reducing an image to a limited color palette, our engine applies error-diffusion dithering to strategically interleave pixels of different colors. This technique simulates smooth color gradients even at low resolutions like 32×32, preventing the flat, banded appearance that simple color quantization produces. The result is a pixel grid that retains visual depth and detail far beyond what its resolution would normally allow.
PixelGridStudio.techColorDesc: Our algorithm calculates the Euclidean distance between each pixel's RGB value and every color in the target palette, selecting the nearest match. When the 32-color retro gaming palette is active, this mathematical formula maps millions of input colors to the closest vintage console color — ensuring accurate, consistent results every time without using any proprietary color data.
PixelGridStudio.printTip: 🖨️ Print Optimization: This page supports native browser printing (Ctrl+P). It automatically hides control panels, giving you a clean, numbered paper grid blueprint perfectly optimized for cross-stitch tracing or offline crafting!
PixelGridStudio.privacyBadge: 🔒 100% Client-Side & Serverless — All image processing runs entirely in your browser via HTML5 Canvas. No backend databases, no uploads. Your images and creative work are fully protected.
PixelGridStudio.faq1A: Dithering is a technique used to create the illusion of color depth in images with limited palettes. It works by strategically placing pixels of different colors next to each other to simulate intermediate shades. Our tool uses error-diffusion dithering to maintain image quality at lower grid sizes.
PixelGridStudio.faq2Q: How do I choose the right grid size?
PixelGridStudio.faq2A: It depends on your project: 16×16 for simple icons and small Perler Bead projects, 32×32 for standard pixel art and cross stitch, 64×64 for detailed artwork, and 128×128 or higher for complex scenes. Larger grids capture more detail but take longer to recreate manually.
PixelGridStudio.faq3Q: Can I use custom color palettes?
PixelGridStudio.faq3A: Yes! Toggle the 'Retro Match' mode to use our built-in 32-color retro gaming palette, or keep the original image colors for a more accurate representation.
PixelGridStudio.faq4A: We support JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP, and WebP formats. For best results, use images under 5MB with clean lines and solid color blocks.

TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.metaDescription: Convert 16 Tomodachi Life Mii personality types to MBTI. Interactive tool with Myers-Briggs compatibility calculator.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.heroSubtitle: Find the perfect Tomodachi Life MBTI match for every Mii personality type. Convert 16 in-game personalities to Myers-Briggs types and explore social compatibility insights.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.chartIntroDesc: Tomodachi Life (often called Tomo by fans) features 16 unique personality types that directly correspond to the 16 MBTI types. Each personality is determined by 5 slider settings: Walking Speed, Speaking Style, Facial Expression, Overall Mood, and Unique Personality. Use this guide to create Miis that match specific MBTI profiles.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.chartNoteInfp: Note: INFP maps to both Independent Artist and Easygoing Softie — this reflects the game's actual personality system where these two types share similar traits.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.slider1Desc: Determines movement speed around the island
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.slider2Desc: Determines tone and speed of speech
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.slider5Tips: Fine-tune this slider for specific personality variants
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.toolIntroDesc: Select a Mii personality type from the list, and our tool will automatically determine the most compatible MBTI type along with social compatibility suggestions.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.compatSuggestE1: Pairs well with Independent types for romantic relationships
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.compatSuggestE2: Forms strong friendships with other Outgoing types
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.compatSuggestE3: May need patience with Easygoing types who prefer slower pacing
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.compatSuggestI1: Thrives with Easygoing types who respect their need for space
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.compatSuggestI2: Forms deep connections with other Independent types
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.compatSuggestI3: May feel overwhelmed by very outgoing Confident types
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanMapDesc: Community-sourced popularity rankings for each Tomodachi Life personality's MBTI mapping. These scores are approximate and based on community discussions, not statistical surveys. Rankings reflect how frequently players associate each in-game personality with its MBTI counterpart.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonLeader: The Leader's organized and responsible nature perfectly aligns with ESTJ's reputation as reliable administrators.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonDesigner: Designers are strategic visionaries, matching INTJ's reputation as 'the architect' personality type.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonDreamer: Dreamers are deeply intuitive and empathetic, making them a natural fit for INFJ's 'advocate' persona.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonArtist: Artists' creative idealism strongly resonates with INFP's 'mediator' type.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonCharmer: Charmers' wit and curiosity match ENTP's 'debater' type perfectly.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonEntertainer: Entertainers' cheerful energy aligns with ESFP's 'performer' personality.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonSweetheart: Sweethearts' nurturing nature matches ISFJ's 'defender' type.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonThinker: Thinkers' analytical approach fits ISTP's 'virtuoso' type well.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonTrendsetter: Trendsetters' enthusiasm and creativity align with ENFP's 'campaigner' type.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonOptimist: Optimists' supportive nature aligns with ESFJ's 'consul' type.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonLoneWolf: Lone Wolves' reliability fits ISTJ's 'logistician' type.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonFreeSpirit: Free Spirits' unconventional thinking aligns with INTP's 'logician' type.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.fanReasonBuddy: Buddies' laid-back nature aligns with ISFP's 'composer' type.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.communityInsight1Desc: Fans consistently map Outgoing types to Extraverted (E) and Independent types to Introverted (I). This axis is the most agreed-upon mapping in the community.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.communityInsight2Desc: Confident types are overwhelmingly associated with Thinking (T), while Easygoing types lean toward Feeling (F). This reflects how these groups approach problem-solving in the game.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.communityInsight3Desc: There's more debate around the J/P axis, with fans interpreting different personality traits differently. Some map Leader to J (organized), while others see Dreamer as P (spontaneous).
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.communityInsight4Desc: Players report that complementary pairings (E+I, T+F) often produce the most dramatic in-game relationships, while same-group pairings tend to be more stable friendships.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq1A:
No. These mappings are fan-made interpretations. Tomodachi Life's personality system was designed independently by Nintendo, not to match MBTI. The parallels are compelling enough to create popular fan theories.

Key points:
• Based on observable behavioral patterns
• Informed by community discussions and polls
• Nintendo does not confirm or deny these connections
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq2Q: Can I change a Mii's personality after creation?
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq2A:
No. Once set during creation, a Mii's personality cannot be changed without deleting and recreating the character.

Important:
• No in-game method to modify personality
• Save files do not store editable personality data
• Plan your Mii's personality before creation
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq3Q: How do the sliders affect personality?
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq3A:
5 sliders (each 0-100) combine to determine one of 16 personality types:

1. Walking Speed: Fast (51-100) → E, Slow (0-50) → I
2. Speaking Style: Direct (51-100) → T, Gentle (0-50) → F
3. Facial Expression: Confident (51-100) → J, Relaxed (0-50) → P
4. Overall Mood: Upbeat (51-100) → E, Calm (0-50) → I
5. Unique Personality: Fine-tunes the specific subtype
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq4Q: Which MBTI types are most compatible?
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq4A:
Complementary pairs (E+I, T+F) produce the highest romance. Same-group pairs produce the highest friendship.

Romance: Outgoing + Independent pairs work best (opposites attract).
Friendship: Same-group pairs form stable bonds (e.g., two Easygoing types).

Gameplay Note: Every combination produces unique interactions.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq5Q: Can I use this to create real people in the game?
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq5A:
Yes. Many players use MBTI as a creative guide to create Miis resembling real people, fictional characters, or celebrities.

Common use cases:
• Creating Miis that resemble yourself or friends
• Designing characters with accurate personality types
• Recreating celebrity personas
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq6Q: Why does INFP map to two different Tomodachi Life personalities?
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.faq6A: INFP maps to both Independent Artist and Easygoing Softie. This reflects the game's personality system where these two types share similar traits across the 5 slider dimensions. Independent Artist leans more introverted, while Easygoing Softie leans more feeling-oriented, but both converge on the INFP profile.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.oneMinTitle: What Is the Tomodachi Life MBTI Tool?
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.oneMinDesc: This tool maps all 16 Tomodachi Life personality types to their MBTI equivalents. Select two personalities to calculate romance and friendship compatibility scores, or use the 5-slider converter to identify your Mii's MBTI type. 100% browser-based — no data leaves your device.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.whyChooseTitle: Why Use This Tomodachi Life MBTI Tool?
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.whyChoose1Desc: Every Tomodachi Life personality type mapped to MBTI with behavioral evidence and community consensus.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.whyChoose2Desc: Calculates both romance and friendship scores using zodiac (50%) + MBTI personality (50%) + modifier formula.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.whyChoose3Desc: All data stays in your browser's localStorage. No server uploads, no accounts, no tracking.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.whyChoose4Desc: Maps the game's 5 creation sliders to 4 quadrants, then classifies into one of 16 MBTI types with clear classification.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.howToTitle: How to Use the Tomodachi Life MBTI Tool — 3 Simple Steps
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.howToStep1Text: Choose two Tomodachi Life personality types from the Compatibility Calculator tab, or search by name in the hero search bar.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.howToStep2Text: Instantly see romance and friendship scores with detailed breakdowns (zodiac match, MBTI complement, modifiers).
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.howToStep3Text: Browse the full 16-personality mapping chart, use the slider converter for custom Miis, and export your resident roster.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.howItWorksTitle: How the Tomodachi Life MBTI Algorithm Works
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.mappingRefText: Community-mapped correspondence between Tomodachi Life's 16 personality types and MBTI (fan interpretation, not official): Outgoing Leader ≈ ESTJ, Outgoing Entertainer ≈ ESFP, Outgoing Trendsetter ≈ ENFP, Outgoing Optimist ≈ ESFJ, Confident Designer ≈ INTJ, Confident Adventurer ≈ ESTP, Confident Go-Getter ≈ ENTJ, Confident Charmer ≈ ENTP, Independent Artist ≈ INFP, Independent Free Spirit ≈ INTP, Independent Thinker ≈ ISTP, Independent Lone Wolf ≈ ISTJ, Easygoing Dreamer ≈ INFJ, Easygoing Sweetheart ≈ ISFJ, Easygoing Softie ≈ INFP, Easygoing Buddy ≈ ISFP.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.topPairingsTitle: Best Tomodachi Life MBTI Compatibility Pairings
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.topPairingsRomance: Highest romance: Outgoing + Independent pairs (E + I complement). Examples: Leader (ESTJ) + Artist (INFP), Entertainer (ESFP) + Free Spirit (INTP).
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.topPairingsFriendship: Highest friendship: Same-group pairs. Examples: Two Easygoing types (Dreamer + Sweetheart), Two Outgoing types (Leader + Entertainer).
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.formulaText: Romance Score = Zodiac (50%) + Base Score (25) + Romance Modifier. Friendship Score = Zodiac (50%) + Base Score (25) + Friendship Modifier. Complementary pairs (Outgoing + Independent, Confident + Easygoing) receive +20 romance. Same-group pairs receive +20 friendship but -10 romance. Same personality type adds +10 friendship but -5 romance.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.algorithmCore: Algorithm Core: 5D Matrix to 4 Quadrants to 16 Types
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.algorithmCoreDesc:
5 sliders (each 1-10) determine personality. The tool maps these 5 dimensions to 4 quadrants, then classifies into one of 16 MBTI types.

Reference: MBTI framework by Katharine Cook Briggs and Isabel Briggs Myers, based on Carl Jung's psychological types.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.quadrantOutgoing: Outgoing (E) — Extraverted types who thrive in social situations
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.quadrantEasygoing: Easygoing (F) — Feeling types who make decisions based on values
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.quadrantIndependent: Independent (I) — Introverted types who prefer quiet environments
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.quadrantConfident: Confident (T/J) — Thinking/Judging types who are decisive and logical
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.privacyDesc:
This tool is built on Next.js architecture. All resident data, birthdays, and compatibility data are stored locally in your browser's localStorage. We never collect or upload any personal data. Remember to export your roster before clearing your browser cache!

Note: This is a fan-made project. MBTI is a registered trademark of the Myers-Briggs Company. Tomodachi Life is a trademark of Nintendo.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.mbtiDisclaimer: MBTI Theory Reference: This mapping is inspired by the Myers-Briggs Type Indicator (MBTI). MBTI is based on Carl Jung's theory of psychological types. Learn more at the official MBTI website or consult the MBTI Manual.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.internalLinkHint: Explore our other tools: ACNH Pixel Studio for custom patterns, Mii QR Unlocker for editing character permissions, and Tomodachi Voice Lab for voice synthesis.
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.privacyNote: All data is stored locally in your browser. We never upload any personal information. Export your roster before clearing cache!

TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.addToRoster: Add This Personality to My Roster
TomodachiLifeMbtiPage.gameZodiacTitle: Game Zodiac Score (Based on Birthday Signs)
